app.name: Telos
app.subtitle: Identity Threat Detection & Response
policy.subtitle: Define and manage security policies using OPA Rego rules. Evaluate account snapshots against all enabled policies to detect compliance violations such as privileged accounts without recent logins, prohibited usernames, or lifecycle violations.
policy.evaluateTitle: Evaluate All Policies Against a Snapshot
policy.inputSnapshotId: Please enter a valid snapshot ID
policy.evalTip: Enter an account snapshot ID to evaluate all enabled policies. Results are persisted for audit.
policy.regoHelper: Supported: deny["msg"] { field op value } or allow { ... }
policy.regoFunctions: Functions: contains(s, sub), startswith(s, p), endswith(s, suf), lower(s), days_since(dt), in(val, list)
Detect shared accounts such as admin, root, test, guest, oracle, etc. These accounts are at high risk of being exploited by attackers.
policy.builtin.privilegedInactive.name: Privileged Account Long-term Inactive
policy.builtin.privilegedInactive.desc: Privileged accounts (is_admin=True) with no login records in 90 days — may be abandoned or compromised.
policy.builtin.nopasswdSudo.name: NOPASSWD Sudo Permission
policy.builtin.nopasswdSudo.desc: Detect NOPASSWD sudo permissions that bypass password verification for privileged operations.
policy.builtin.uidRange.name: System Account UID Range
policy.builtin.uidRange.desc: Accounts with UID < 1000 are typically system accounts and should not be used by human users.
policy.builtin.dormantAccount.name: Dormant Account Should Be Disabled
policy.builtin.dormantAccount.desc: Accounts in dormant status for over 180 days should be disabled or removed.
policy.builtin.rootAccount.name: Root Account Detection
policy.builtin.rootAccount.desc: Linux root account should be disabled if not strictly necessary, as attackers can directly log in as root.
ueba.detectTip: Run anomaly detection on all accounts
ueba.desc.dormantToActive: Account {{username}} (@{{asset}}) reactivated from departed status, last login: {{last_login}}
ueba.desc.wentDormant: Account {{username}} (@{{asset}}) became {{status}}, no login for {{days}} days
ueba.desc.privilegedNoLogin: Privileged account {{username}} (@{{asset}}) has never logged in
ueba.desc.crossAssetAwakening: Account {{username}} simultaneously reactivated on {{count}} assets (all previously dormant/departed)
ueba.desc.dormanttoactive: Account {{username}} (@{{asset}}) reactivated from departed status, last login: {{last_login}}
ueba.desc.wentdormant: Account {{username}} (@{{asset}}) became {{status}}, no login for {{days}} days
ueba.desc.privilegednologin: Privileged account {{username}} (@{{asset}}) has never logged in
ueba.desc.crossassetawakening: Account {{username}} simultaneously reactivated on {{count}} assets (all previously dormant/departed)

credential.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep the original password. Fill in to change.

compliance.allPassed: All check items passed, keep it up
compliance.framework.soc2.name: SOC2
compliance.framework.soc2.desc: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria — Account Security & Privileged Access Control
compliance.framework.iso27001.name: ISO 27001
compliance.framework.iso27001.desc: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management System — Access Control Domain
compliance.framework.dengbao2.name: Equal Level 2.0
compliance.framework.dengbao2.desc: Cybersecurity Level Protection System 2.0 — Level 3 System Account Security Requirements
compliance.check.CC6_1.title: Shared Privileged Account Detection
compliance.check.CC6_1.desc: Admin accounts appearing on multiple assets violate the principle of least privilege
compliance.check.CC6_3.title: Unused Privileged Account Cleanup
compliance.check.CC6_3.desc: Admin accounts inactive for 90+ days should be disabled or removed
compliance.check.CC6_6.title: Periodic Access Review
compliance.check.CC6_6.desc: All assets should be scanned at least once within 30 days
compliance.check.A9_2_3.title: No-Password Sudo Prohibition
compliance.check.A9_2_3.desc: Accounts must not have passwordless sudo (NOPASSWD) permissions
compliance.check.A9_2_5.title: Authentication Failure Resolution
compliance.check.A9_2_5.desc: Assets with authentication failures indicate credential misconfiguration
compliance.check.A9_4_3.title: Privileged Account Ratio
compliance.check.A9_4_3.desc: Admin account ratio should not exceed 50%; distinguish management/audit/operations accounts
compliance.check.DBAP_TS.title: Offline Asset with Privileged Accounts
compliance.check.DBAP_TS.desc: Privileged accounts on offline assets should be promptly handled or decommissioned
compliance.check.DBAP_OA.title: Inactive Admin Account Review
compliance.check.DBAP_OA.desc: Admin accounts inactive for 90+ days should be evaluated for deactivation
compliance.check.CC6_3_dengbao.title: Long-term Inactive Privileged Account Review
compliance.check.CC6_3_dengbao.desc: Admin accounts inactive for 90+ days should be evaluated for deactivation
risk.label: Risk
threat.title: Threat Analysis
threat.noAnalysis: No analysis results yet. Click 'Trigger Analysis' to start.
threat.clickSimulate: Click 'Run Simulation' to see blast radius
threat.graphRenderError: Graph rendering error. Please refresh the page.
threat.graphLibLoadFailed: Graph library failed to load. Please check your network and refresh.
playbooks.title: Remediation Playbooks
playbooks.description: Define automated remediation workflows for account anomalies. High-risk actions require approval before execution.
playbooks.name: Name
playbooks.executeHint: Execute playbook "{name}" for the specified account.
playbooks.templateCredLeak.name: Critical Credential Leak — Auto-disable
playbooks.templateCredLeak.desc: When SSH private key is world-readable or other critical credential exposure is detected, automatically disable the account and notify the owner
playbooks.templateNopasswd.name: NOPASSWD Sudo — Flag for Review
playbooks.templateNopasswd.desc: When NOPASSWD sudo permission is detected, flag as high-risk for review and recommend revocation
playbooks.templateDormant.name: Inactive Privileged Account — Auto-disable
playbooks.templateDormant.desc: When a departed or long-inactive privileged account is detected, automatically disable it and notify the administrator
playbooks.templateShadow.name: Shadow Account — Flag for Review
playbooks.templateShadow.desc: When an active account without an associated owner is detected (potential shadow account), notify the security team for manual review
playbooks.templateSSHReuse.name: SSH Key Reuse — Flag Lateral Movement Risk
playbooks.templateSSHReuse.desc: When cross-asset SSH public key reuse is detected (lateral movement path), notify the security team to assess risk
playbooks.templateNewPrivilege.name: New Privileged Account — Flag for Review
playbooks.templateNewPrivilege.desc: When a new privileged account (admin/sudo group) is detected, notify the security team to confirm if it is an authorized change
nhi.title: Non-Human Identity (NHI) Management
nhi.subtitle: Discover · Classify · Assess Risk · Govern
nhi.syncSuccess: Sync complete: {nhi} NHI, {human} human accounts, {alerts} new alerts
nhi.criticalAlertDesc: NHI accounts with NOPASSWD sudo or credential leaks must be addressed immediately
nhi.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address
owner.title: Owner
owner.assignDesc: Enter the owner's email to auto-link to the human identity registry
owner.hint: The system will auto-link to HumanIdentity by matching email
threat.clickToLoadReport: Click the button above to load the AI summary
attck.title: ATT&CK Coverage
attck.noCoverage: No ATT&CK coverage data — run an analysis first
attck.unmappedHint: Add MITRE ATT&CK mapping in mitre_mapping.py for these signal types
attck.runAnalysisFirst: Run a global scan first in the Identity Threat Analysis page
alert.msg.admin_privilege_added: Account {{username}} on Asset #{{asset_id}} gained admin privileges. Please verify authorization.
alert.msg.nopasswd_sudo_added: Account {{username}} on Asset #{{asset_id}} gained sudo NOPASSWD rights — this is a high-risk configuration change.
alert.msg.credential_leak: Account {{username}} on Asset #{{asset_id}} has {{count}} dangerous credentials exposed: {{finding_msgs}}
alert.msg.dormant_reactivated: Account {{username}} (Asset #{{asset_id}}) previously had lifecycle status {{lifecycle_status}}. Last login: {{last_login}}. Please verify if this is normal business activity.
alert.msg.orphan_account: Account {{username}} on Asset #{{asset_id}} (UID={{uid_sid}}) is a privileged account with no linked identity. Possible shadow account — verify ownership immediately.
